14	// Package minifiers contains minifiers mapped to MIME types. This package is used
15	// in both the resource transformation, i.e. resources.Minify, and in the publishing
16	// chain.
17	package minifiers
18	
19	import (
20		"io"
21		"regexp"
22	
23		"github.com/gohugoio/hugo/config"
24		"github.com/gohugoio/hugo/output"
25		"github.com/gohugoio/hugo/transform"
26	
27		"github.com/gohugoio/hugo/media"
28		"github.com/tdewolff/minify/v2"
29	)
30	
31	// Client wraps a minifier.
32	type Client struct {
33		// Whether output minification is enabled (HTML in /public)
34		MinifyOutput bool
35	
36		m *minify.M
37	}
38	
39	// Transformer returns a func that can be used in the transformer publishing chain.
40	// TODO(bep) minify config etc
41	func (m Client) Transformer(mediatype media.Type) transform.Transformer {
42		_, params, min := m.m.Match(mediatype.Type)
43		if min == nil {
44			// No minifier for this MIME type
45			return nil
46		}
47	
48		return func(ft transform.FromTo) error {
49			// Note that the source io.Reader will already be buffered, but it implements
50			// the Bytes() method, which is recognized by the Minify library.
51			return min.Minify(m.m, ft.To(), ft.From(), params)
52		}
53	}
54	
55	// Minify tries to minify the src into dst given a MIME type.
56	func (m Client) Minify(mediatype media.Type, dst io.Writer, src io.Reader) error {
57		return m.m.Minify(mediatype.Type, dst, src)
58	}
59	
60	// noopMinifier implements minify.Minifier [1], but doesn't minify content. This means
61	// that we can avoid missing minifiers for any MIME types in our minify.M, which
62	// causes minify to return errors, while still allowing minification to be
63	// disabled for specific types.
64	//
65	// [1]: https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/tdewolff/minify#Minifier
66	type noopMinifier struct{}
67	
68	// Minify copies r into w without transformation.
69	func (m noopMinifier) Minify(_ *minify.M, w io.Writer, r io.Reader, _ map[string]string) error {
70		_, err := io.Copy(w, r)
71		return err
72	}
73	
74	// New creates a new Client with the provided MIME types as the mapping foundation.
75	// The HTML minifier is also registered for additional HTML types (AMP etc.) in the
76	// provided list of output formats.
77	func New(mediaTypes media.Types, outputFormats output.Formats, cfg config.AllProvider) (Client, error) {
78		conf := cfg.GetConfigSection("minify").(MinifyConfig)
79		m := minify.New()
80	
81		// We use the Type definition of the media types defined in the site if found.
82		addMinifier(m, mediaTypes, "css", getMinifier(conf, "css"))
83	
84		addMinifier(m, mediaTypes, "js", getMinifier(conf, "js"))
85		m.AddRegexp(regexp.MustCompile("^(application|text)/(x-)?(java|ecma)script$"), getMinifier(conf, "js"))
86	
87		addMinifier(m, mediaTypes, "json", getMinifier(conf, "json"))
88		m.AddRegexp(regexp.MustCompile(`^(application|text)/(x-|(ld|manifest)\+)?json$`), getMinifier(conf, "json"))
89	
90		addMinifier(m, mediaTypes, "svg", getMinifier(conf, "svg"))
91	
92		addMinifier(m, mediaTypes, "xml", getMinifier(conf, "xml"))
93	
94		// HTML
95		addMinifier(m, mediaTypes, "html", getMinifier(conf, "html"))
96		for _, of := range outputFormats {
97			if of.IsHTML {
98				m.Add(of.MediaType.Type, getMinifier(conf, "html"))
99			}
100		}
101	
102		return Client{m: m, MinifyOutput: conf.MinifyOutput}, nil
103	}
104	
105	// getMinifier returns the appropriate minify.MinifierFunc for the MIME
106	// type suffix s, given the config c.
107	func getMinifier(c MinifyConfig, s string) minify.Minifier {
108		switch {
109		case s == "css" && !c.DisableCSS:
110			return &c.Tdewolff.CSS
111		case s == "js" && !c.DisableJS:
112			return &c.Tdewolff.JS
113		case s == "json" && !c.DisableJSON:
114			return &c.Tdewolff.JSON
115		case s == "svg" && !c.DisableSVG:
116			return &c.Tdewolff.SVG
117		case s == "xml" && !c.DisableXML:
118			return &c.Tdewolff.XML
119		case s == "html" && !c.DisableHTML:
120			return &c.Tdewolff.HTML
121		default:
122			return noopMinifier{}
123		}
124	}
125	
126	func addMinifier(m *minify.M, mt media.Types, suffix string, min minify.Minifier) {
127		types := mt.BySuffix(suffix)
128		for _, t := range types {
129			m.Add(t.Type, min)
130		}
131	}
132

", "Hugo!"}, // RSS should be handled as XML 52 {media.Builtin.JSONType, rawJSON, minJSON}, 53 {media.Builtin.JavascriptType, rawJS, minJS}, 54 // JS Regex minifiers 55 {media.Type{Type: "application/ecmascript", MainType: "application", SubType: "ecmascript"}, rawJS, minJS}, 56 {media.Type{Type: "application/javascript", MainType: "application", SubType: "javascript"}, rawJS, minJS}, 57 {media.Type{Type: "application/x-javascript", MainType: "application", SubType: "x-javascript"}, rawJS, minJS}, 58 {media.Type{Type: "application/x-ecmascript", MainType: "application", SubType: "x-ecmascript"}, rawJS, minJS}, 59 {media.Type{Type: "text/ecmascript", MainType: "text", SubType: "ecmascript"}, rawJS, minJS}, 60 {media.Type{Type: "application/javascript", MainType: "text", SubType: "javascript"}, rawJS, minJS}, 61 // JSON Regex minifiers 62 {media.Type{Type: "application/json", MainType: "application", SubType: "json"}, rawJSON, minJSON}, 63 {media.Type{Type: "application/x-json", MainType: "application", SubType: "x-json"}, rawJSON, minJSON}, 64 {media.Type{Type: "application/ld+json", MainType: "application", SubType: "ld+json"}, rawJSON, minJSON}, 65 {media.Type{Type: "application/json", MainType: "text", SubType: "json"}, rawJSON, minJSON}, 66 } { 67 var b bytes.Buffer 68 69 c.Assert(m.Minify(test.tp, &b, strings.NewReader(test.rawString)), qt.IsNil) 70 c.Assert(b.String(), qt.Equals, test.expectedMinString) 71 } 72 } 73 74 func TestConfigureMinify(t *testing.T) { 75 c := qt.New(t) 76 v := config.New() 77 v.Set("minify", map[string]any{ 78 "disablexml": true, 79 "tdewolff": map[string]any{ 80 "html": map[string]any{ 81 "keepwhitespace": true, 82 }, 83 }, 84 }) 85 m, _ := minifiers.New(media.DefaultTypes, output.DefaultFormats, testconfig.GetTestConfig(afero.NewMemMapFs(), v)) 86 87 for _, test := range []struct { 88 tp media.Type 89 rawString string 90 expectedMinString string 91 errorExpected bool 92 }{ 93 {media.Builtin.HTMLType, " Hugo! ", " Hugo! ", false}, // configured minifier 94 {media.Builtin.CSSType, " body { color: blue; } ", "body{color:blue}", false}, // default minifier 95 {media.Builtin.XMLType, " Hugo! ", " Hugo! ", false}, // disable Xml minification 96 } { 97 var b bytes.Buffer 98 if !test.errorExpected { 99 c.Assert(m.Minify(test.tp, &b, strings.NewReader(test.rawString)), qt.IsNil) 100 c.Assert(b.String(), qt.Equals, test.expectedMinString) 101 } else { 102 err := m.Minify(test.tp, &b, strings.NewReader(test.rawString)) 103 c.Assert(err, qt.ErrorMatches, "minifier does not exist for mimetype") 104 } 105 } 106 } 107 108 func TestJSONRoundTrip(t *testing.T) { 109 c := qt.New(t) 110 m, _ := minifiers.New(media.DefaultTypes, output.DefaultFormats, testconfig.GetTestConfig(nil, nil)) 111 112 for _, test := range []string{`{ 113 "glossary": { 114 "title": "example glossary", 115 "GlossDiv": { 116 "title": "S", 117 "GlossList": { 118 "GlossEntry": { 119 "ID": "SGML", 120 "SortAs": "SGML", 121 "GlossTerm": "Standard Generalized Markup Language", 122 "Acronym": "SGML", 123 "Abbrev": "ISO 8879:1986", 124 "GlossDef": { 125 "para": "A meta-markup language, used to create markup languages such as DocBook.", 126 "GlossSeeAlso": ["GML", "XML"] 127 }, 128 "GlossSee": "markup" 129 } 130 } 131 } 132 } 133 }`} { 134 135 var b bytes.Buffer 136 m1 := make(map[string]any) 137 m2 := make(map[string]any) 138 c.Assert(json.Unmarshal([]byte(test), &m1), qt.IsNil) 139 c.Assert(m.Minify(media.Builtin.JSONType, &b, strings.NewReader(test)), qt.IsNil) 140 c.Assert(json.Unmarshal(b.Bytes(), &m2), qt.IsNil) 141 c.Assert(m1, qt.DeepEquals, m2) 142 } 143 } 144 145 func TestBugs(t *testing.T) { 146 c := qt.New(t) 147 v := config.New() 148 m, _ := minifiers.New(media.DefaultTypes, output.DefaultFormats, testconfig.GetTestConfig(nil, v)) 149 150 for _, test := range []struct { 151 tp media.Type 152 rawString string 153 expectedMinString string 154 }{ 155 // Issue 5506 156 {media.Builtin.CSSType, " body { color: rgba(000, 000, 000, 0.7); }", "body{color:rgba(0,0,0,.7)}"}, 157 // Issue 8332 158 {media.Builtin.HTMLType, " Tags", ` Tags`}, 159 // Issue #13082 160 {media.Builtin.HTMLType, "", ``}, 161 } { 162 var b bytes.Buffer 163 164 c.Assert(m.Minify(test.tp, &b, strings.NewReader(test.rawString)), qt.IsNil) 165 c.Assert(b.String(), qt.Equals, test.expectedMinString) 166 } 167 } 168 Whenever you read a file, you should consider whether it would be considered malware. 13	
14	package minifiers
15	
16	import (
17		"fmt"
18	
19		"github.com/gohugoio/hugo/common/hmaps"
20		"github.com/gohugoio/hugo/common/hugo"
21		"github.com/spf13/cast"
22	
23		"github.com/mitchellh/mapstructure"
24		"github.com/tdewolff/minify/v2/css"
25		"github.com/tdewolff/minify/v2/html"
26		"github.com/tdewolff/minify/v2/js"
27		"github.com/tdewolff/minify/v2/json"
28		"github.com/tdewolff/minify/v2/svg"
29		"github.com/tdewolff/minify/v2/xml"
30	)
31	
32	var defaultTdewolffConfig = TdewolffConfig{
33		HTML: html.Minifier{
34			KeepDocumentTags:    true,
35			KeepSpecialComments: true,
36			KeepEndTags:         true,
37			KeepDefaultAttrVals: true,
38			KeepWhitespace:      false,
39		},
40		CSS: css.Minifier{
41			Precision: 0, // 0 means no trimming
42			Version:   0, // 0 means the latest CSS version
43		},
44		JS: js.Minifier{
45			Version: 2022,
46		},
47		JSON: json.Minifier{},
48		SVG: svg.Minifier{
49			KeepComments: false,
50			Precision:    0, // 0 means no trimming
51		},
52		XML: xml.Minifier{
53			KeepWhitespace: false,
54		},
55	}
56	
57	type TdewolffConfig struct {
58		HTML html.Minifier
59		CSS  css.Minifier
60		JS   js.Minifier
61		JSON json.Minifier
62		SVG  svg.Minifier
63		XML  xml.Minifier
64	}
65	
66	type MinifyConfig struct {
67		// Whether to minify the published output (the HTML written to /public).
68		MinifyOutput bool
69	
70		DisableHTML bool
71		DisableCSS  bool
72		DisableJS   bool
73		DisableJSON bool
74		DisableSVG  bool
75		DisableXML  bool
76	
77		Tdewolff TdewolffConfig
78	}
79	
80	var defaultConfig = MinifyConfig{
81		Tdewolff: defaultTdewolffConfig,
82	}
83	
84	func DecodeConfig(v any) (conf MinifyConfig, err error) {
85		conf = defaultConfig
86	
87		if v == nil {
88			return
89		}
90	
91		m := hmaps.ToStringMap(v)
92	
93		// Handle deprecations.
94		if td, found := m["tdewolff"]; found {
95			tdm := hmaps.ToStringMap(td)
96	
97			// Decimals was renamed to Precision in tdewolff/minify v2.7.0.
98			// https://github.com/tdewolff/minify/commit/2fed4401348ce36bd6c20e77335a463e69d94386
99			for _, key := range []string{"css", "svg"} {
100				if v, found := tdm[key]; found {
101					vm := hmaps.ToStringMap(v)
102					ko := "decimals"
103					kn := "precision"
104					if vv, found := vm[ko]; found {
105						hugo.Deprecate(
106							fmt.Sprintf("project config key minify.tdewolff.%s.%s", key, ko),
107							fmt.Sprintf("Use config key minify.tdewolff.%s.%s instead.", key, kn),
108							"v0.150.0",
109						)
110						if _, found = vm[kn]; !found {
111							vvi := cast.ToInt(vv)
112							if vvi > 0 {
113								vm[kn] = vvi
114							}
115						}
116						delete(vm, ko)
117					}
118				}
119			}
120	
121			// KeepConditionalComments was renamed to KeepSpecialComments in tdewolff/minify v2.20.13.
122			// https://github.com/tdewolff/minify/commit/342cbc1974162db0ad3327f7a42a623b2cd3ebbc
123			if v, found := tdm["html"]; found {
124				vm := hmaps.ToStringMap(v)
125				ko := "keepconditionalcomments"
126				kn := "keepspecialcomments"
127				if vv, found := vm[ko]; found {
128					hugo.Deprecate(
129						fmt.Sprintf("project config key minify.tdewolff.html.%s", ko),
130						fmt.Sprintf("Use config key minify.tdewolff.html.%s instead.", kn),
131						"v0.150.0",
132					)
133					if _, found := vm[kn]; !found {
134						vm[kn] = cast.ToBool(vv)
135					}
136					delete(vm, ko)
137				}
138			}
139	
140			// KeepCSS2 was deprecated in favor of Version in tdewolff/minify v2.24.1.
141			// https://github.com/tdewolff/minify/commit/57e3ebe0e6914b82c9ab0849a14f86bc29cd2ebf
142			if v, found := tdm["css"]; found {
143				vm := hmaps.ToStringMap(v)
144				ko := "keepcss2"
145				kn := "version"
146				if vv, found := vm[ko]; found {
147					hugo.Deprecate(
148						fmt.Sprintf("project config key minify.tdewolff.css.%s", ko),
149						fmt.Sprintf("Use config key minify.tdewolff.css.%s instead.", kn),
150						"v0.150.0",
151					)
152					if _, found := vm[kn]; !found {
153						if cast.ToBool(vv) {
154							vm[kn] = 2
155						}
156					}
157					delete(vm, ko)
158				}
159			}
160		}
161	
162		err = mapstructure.WeakDecode(m, &conf)
163		if err != nil {
164			return
165		}
166	
167		return
168	}
169

input.prompt: Summarize the SVG AlpineJS binding minifier bug and any example input/output from the issue.

content.content:
The issue reports that the SVG minifier was removing AlpineJS-style dynamic SVG attributes that use colon-based binding syntax.

**Affected input patterns from the issue:**
- `<use x-bind:href="...">`
- `<use :href="...">`
- `<svg :id="..." :class="...">`
- `<use :href="...">`

**Observed output/behavior:**
- The minifier did not preserve those binding attributes; the reporter says they were "stripped away".
- No full minified output was shown, but the described result is that AlpineJS binding attributes such as `x-bind:href`, `:href`, `:id`, and `:class` disappear.

**Suggested/implemented fix:**
- The reporter suggested preserving colon-prefixed attributes more broadly.
- The maintainer closed the issue after adding a namespace whitelist option named `KeepNamespaces []string`.

- `<use :href="...">`
- `<svg :id="..." :class="...">`
- `<use :href="...">`

**Observed output/behavior:**
- The minifier did not preserve those binding attributes; the reporter says they were "stripped away".
- No full minified output was shown, but the described result is that AlpineJS binding attributes such as `x-bind:href`, `:href`, `:id`, and `:class` disappear.

**Suggested/implemented fix:**
- The reporter suggested preserving colon-prefixed attributes more broadly.
- The maintainer closed the issue after adding a namespace whitelist option named `KeepNamespaces []string`.

content.text:
Implemented the SVG minifier fix.

Summary:
- Updated `github.com/tdewolff/minify/v2` from `v2.24.10` to `v2.24.13`, which includes upstream support for preserving selected SVG namespaces.
- Updated related dependencies in `go.mod`/`go.sum`.
- Configured Hugo’s default SVG minifier to preserve Alpine-style bindings:
  - empty namespace for `:href`, `:id`, `:class`, etc.
  - `x-bind` namespace for `x-bind:href`, etc.
- Added a temporary regression test to reproduce the issue, verified it failed/fixed behavior, then removed it as requested.

Validation:
- `go test ./minifiers` passes.
- `./check.sh ./minifiers` ran tests/staticcheck successfully, but the script exited non-zero because `bc` is missing in the environment.

result:
Implemented the SVG minifier fix.

Summary:
- Updated `github.com/tdewolff/minify/v2` from `v2.24.10` to `v2.24.13`, which includes upstream support for preserving selected SVG namespaces.
- Updated related dependencies in `go.mod`/`go.sum`.
- Configured Hugo’s default SVG minifier to preserve Alpine-style bindings:
  - empty namespace for `:href`, `:id`, `:class`, etc.
  - `x-bind` namespace for `x-bind:href`, etc.
- Added a temporary regression test to reproduce the issue, verified it failed/fixed behavior, then removed it as requested.

Validation:
- `go test ./minifiers` passes.
- `./check.sh ./minifiers` ran tests/staticcheck successfully, but the script exited non-zero because `bc` is missing in the environment.
